description: The epic-grill skill appends each crystallised decision to .excn/runtime/grill-decisions.log as one JSON object per line; any reader splits on newline and skips a line that fails to parse, surviving a torn final write.
title: execution-epic-grill appends crystallised decisions to an append-only log
acceptance_criteria: execution-epic-grill appends one JSONL entry per crystallised decision to grill-decisions.log
A reader skips an unparseable torn last line rather than throwing
Src-First: byte-identical src/template and root mirror
